The '''Battle of Jaga's Cluster''' was one of the final battles of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Despite the fact that the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] would soon lose the war and be almost entirely wiped out, they still managed an impressive victory against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], destroying an entire enemy fleet group. It was at [[Jaga's Cluster/Legends|Jaga's Cluster]] that the Mandalorian commander, [[Cassus Fett]], became the most-wanted man in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] for his killing of the Republic fleet commander in hand-to-hand combat, and subsequent flight into deep space.
